prompt:
Reference image role: the previous blog thumbnail (mountains + glowing cube) defines the style — Chinese ink-wash painting fused with one soft modern tech metaphor, warm parchment-green background, low contrast, painterly soft edges. PRESERVE this style exactly.

Create a 16:9 blog thumbnail for article "自定义 AllReduce 算子实现思路". NO text.

Subject: Ink-wash painting of a calm lake with one central stone in the middle of the water, with perfectly symmetric concentric ripple waves radiating outward in four cardinal directions (suggesting AllReduce collective). Painted in soft grey-black brush strokes. Faint mountains in the far background. A subtle golden #C0A35D ring overlay aligns with one of the ripple circles. Tiny firefly cyan #9CF0BD glow at the center stone.

Style: Brush-painted, atmospheric, low contrast. Same warm parchment-green background.

Color HEX: ink black #1a1d1c, mist grey #3a4540, paper warm #2a3128, cyan #9CF0BD, gold #C0A35D.

Avoid: real text, characters, photographic, neon, red, purple, cartoonish, modern flat illustration.
